component.name: Kiro
component.summary: Agentic AI IDE — prototype to production

p.em: This is an unofficial, community-maintained Flatpak package. Kiro is a proprietary application developed by Amazon Web Services.

ul.li: Specs — Turn prompts into structured implementation plans
Hooks — Automate tasks triggered by file changes and events
Agentic Chat — Build features through natural conversation
MCP Servers — Connect external tools via Model Context Protocol
VS Code compatible — Import extensions, themes, and settings

description.p: Latest stable release of Kiro IDE.
